recent_projects.name: mcp-atlassian-bruno
recent_projects.summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) Atlassian integration is an open-source implementation that bridges Atlassian products (Jira and Confluence) with AI language models following Anthropic's MCP specification. This project enables secure, contextual AI interactions with Atlassian tools while maintaining data privacy and security. Key features include:

recent_projects.name: terence
recent_projects.summary: Terence is a Python package that makes it easy to scan and analyze GitHub repositories. It simplifies the GitHub API and processes the repo contents into a simple flat dictionary that can be accessed by file path.
recent_projects.author: GarfieldFluffJr
